iree_add_all_subdirs()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
iree_native_test(
  NAME
    "online_softmax_tail_attention_tile_f32_plan_test"
  ARGS
    "{{${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/src/loom/test/integration/checked_benchmarks/online_softmax_tail_attention_tile_f32.loom}}"
    "--benchmark=@online_softmax_tail_attention_tile_f32_smoke"
    "--dry-run"
    "--output-format=jsonl"
  SRC
    loom::tools::iree-benchmark-loom
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
iree_native_test(
  NAME
    "packed_s8_fields_f16scale_f32dot_plan_test"
  ARGS
    "{{${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/src/loom/test/integration/checked_benchmarks/packed_s8_fields_f16scale_f32dot.loom}}"
    "--benchmark=@packed_s8_fields_f16scale_f32dot_smoke"
    "--dry-run"
    "--output-format=jsonl"
  SRC
    loom::tools::iree-benchmark-loom
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
iree_native_test(
  NAME
    "online_softmax_tail_attention_tile_f32_amdgpu_test"
  ARGS
    "{{${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/src/loom/test/integration/checked_benchmarks/online_softmax_tail_attention_tile_f32.loom}}"
    "--benchmark=@online_softmax_tail_attention_tile_f32_smoke"
    "--device=amdgpu"
    "--measure=dispatch_complete"
    "--iterations=1"
    "--warmup-iterations=0"
    "--batch-size=1"
    "--min-time-ms=0"
    "--max-batches=1"
    "--input-ring-count=1"
    "--output-format=jsonl"
  SRC
    loom::tools::iree-benchmark-loom
  LABELS
    "iree-run-requirement=runtime.resource.amd_gpu"
    "manual"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
    "runtime-resource=amd-gpu"
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)

  NAME
    "packed_s8_fields_f16scale_f32dot_amdgpu_test"
  ARGS
    "{{${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/src/loom/test/integration/checked_benchmarks/packed_s8_fields_f16scale_f32dot.loom}}"

    "--device=amdgpu"
    "--measure=dispatch_complete"
    "--iterations=1"
    "--warmup-iterations=0"
    "--batch-size=1"
    "--min-time-ms=0"
    "--max-batches=1"
    "--input-ring-count=1"
    "--output-format=jsonl"
  SRC
    loom::tools::iree-benchmark-loom
  LABELS
    "iree-run-requirement=runtime.resource.amd_gpu"
    "manual"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
    "runtime-resource=amd-gpu"
